<!--
  PORTMAN does NOT accept pull requests.
  See CONTRIBUTING.md — sole maintainer @al-nemirov.

  If you have an idea, open an Issue instead — it's faster and gets implemented more often.
  If you want to make changes for yourself, fork freely under MIT.

  This PR will be closed without review. No hard feelings — it's a personal project policy.
-->

## ⛔ Pull requests are not accepted

This is a personal project. Pull requests are closed unmerged regardless of content.

**What to do instead:**

1. **Open an issue** with what you want changed — feature requests are usually implemented quickly: [Feature request →](https://github.com/al-nemirov/portman/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
2. **Fork the repo** under MIT and ship your own version.

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full policy.
